common.keepMeSignedInFor30Days: Keep me signed in for 30 days

dashboard.title: Dashboard

setup.title: System Setup Required
setup.description: Configure your IoT monitoring system to get started
setup.noDevices: No devices have been configured yet. To start monitoring water quality:
setup.step1: Deploy buoy sensor nodes to wells/reservoirs
setup.step2: Set up LoRaWAN gateways for network connectivity
setup.step3: Register devices in the system configuration

dashboard.description: Visualize live readings, history, and system performance.

live.unavailableTitle: Live data unavailable - showing last known readings
live.unavailableDescription: MQTT and polling are both unavailable. We will keep the last readings visible while we reconnect.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage your account information and preferences
profile.phoneDescription: Used for SMS alerts and two-factor authentication

actionBar.unsavedMessage: You have modified your profile. Save or discard changes to continue.
actionBar.savedMessage: Your profile is up to date.

avatar.title: Profile Picture
avatar.description: Choose from suggested avatars or provide your own image

profile.bioDescription: Brief description for your profile (max 500 characters)

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your application preferences, notifications, and system units

regional.title: Localization
regional.description: Configure timezone and language preferences for your account
regional.timezoneDescription: All timestamps will be displayed in this timezone
regional.themeDescription: Choose the interface appearance for this session and future sign-ins

notifications.title: Alert Preferences
notifications.description: Control how and when you receive system notifications
notifications.emailAlertsDescription: Receive email notifications for water quality alerts and device status changes
notifications.criticalOnlyDescription: Only receive notifications for critical issues (fall detection, severe contamination)
notifications.dailySummaryDescription: Get a daily email with system status, water quality metrics, and device health
notifications.maintenanceRemindersDescription: Receive reminders for sensor calibration, anti-fouling cycles, and battery replacements
notifications.browserNotifications: Enable browser notifications for critical alerts
notifications.browserNotificationsDescription: Ask this browser to show a notification when a new critical alert arrives.
notifications.browserUnsupported: This browser does not support notifications.
notifications.browserDenied: Notifications are blocked. Enable them in your browser settings to use this option.
notifications.alertSoundDescription: Play a short tone in this browser when a new critical alert arrives.
notifications.alertThresholdDescription: Filter the alerts list display without changing what is stored or fetched.

units.title: Measurement Units
units.description: Configure display units for sensor readings and system metrics
units.temperatureDescription: Used for ambient and water temperature readings
units.distanceDescription: Used for well depth and distance measurements
units.volumeDescription: Used for water volumes where the dashboard displays them.
units.noteText: Water quality metrics (pH, TDS) are displayed in standard units regardless of these settings.

actionBar.unsavedMessage: You have modified your settings. Save or discard changes to continue.
actionBar.savedMessage: Your settings are up to date.

appearance.compactModeDescription: Reduce spacing and text size across dashboard views to fit more information.
appearance.sidebarDefaultCollapsed: Start with sidebar collapsed by default
appearance.sidebarDefaultCollapsedDescription: Use this state for fresh dashboard sessions and new logins.
appearance.dateFormatDescription: Choose how dates are displayed across dashboard tables and timelines.
appearance.timeFormatDescription: Switch off to use 12-hour time with AM/PM.

privacy.sessionTimeoutDescription: End the session after inactivity. Activity resets the timer.
privacy.neverWarning: Never signing out automatically is not recommended on shared devices.
privacy.presenceVisible: Show my online status to administrators
privacy.presenceVisibleDescription: When disabled, administrators will see you as offline even when you are active.
privacy.loginHistoryDescription: This is for your security. Location context is based on your stored timezone.

dashboardBehavior.refreshRateDescription: Choose how often live sensor readings refresh on the dashboard.
dashboardBehavior.defaultTab: When I open the dashboard, show me
dashboardBehavior.defaultTabDescription: Scroll the dashboard to the section you prefer first.

accessibility.reducedMotionDescription: Minimize motion effects in addition to your operating system setting.
accessibility.highContrastDescription: Strengthen borders and secondary text for better readability.
accessibility.fontSizeDescription: Adjust the base text size used across the dashboard.

danger.passwordDescription: Use the password reset flow to change your password securely.

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.description: Centralized administration for users, operations, deployment, and diagnostics.

manageUsers.title: Manage Users
manageUsers.description: Review user accounts, role assignments, and access control.
manageUsers.action: Use this page to manage accounts, role assignments, and access decisions.

superviseSystem.title: Supervise System
superviseSystem.description: Track system status and operational health indicators.
superviseSystem.action: Monitor system performance, resource utilization, and operational metrics.

deployUpdates.title: Deploy Updates
deployUpdates.description: Coordinate deployments and monitor update rollouts.
deployUpdates.action: Plan releases, trigger update rollouts, and validate deployment readiness.

diagnoseProblems.title: Diagnose Problems
diagnoseProblems.description: Investigate incidents and run diagnostic procedures.
diagnoseProblems.action: Investigate incidents, run system diagnostics, and resolve technical issues.

manageUsers.title: Manage Users
manageUsers.description: Search, filter, and manage user access across the platform.
manageUsers.confirmDelete: This will permanently remove {name} from the system.
manageUsers.confirmDemote: {name} will be changed to operator access.
manageUsers.cannotEditSelf: You cannot modify your own account.

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.description: Track critical, warnings, and informational events.

support.title: Support & Bug Reports
support.pageSubtitle: We're here to support you every step of the way.
support.searchPlaceholder: Search by title or ticket ID...

dialog.noteDescription: Update the internal note for this ticket.

support.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete this ticket.

landing.title: How can we help?
landing.subtitle: Choose an option below
landing.newTicketDesc: Report a bug or system problem

chat.title: Live Chat
chat.unavailableHint: Submit a ticket and we'll get back to you.
chat.empty: Start the conversation by sending a message.
chat.requestAcceptedHint: Support Agent will respond when your request is accepted.
chat.requestDescription: Enter a short subject or reason so Support Agent can route your request.
chat.reasonPlaceholder: Example: Sensor readings are inconsistent after reconnecting the gateway
chat.queueHint: Live chat is queued in the order requests are received.
chat.filterHint: Bad words are filtered before messages are sent.
chat.ticketFallbackHint: You can continue using tickets if the chat is paused or ended.
chat.queueEmpty: Your request is in the queue. Messages will appear once Support Agent accepts it.
chat.startConversation: Start the conversation with Support Agent.
chat.waitingDescription: Support Agent has not accepted this chat yet.
chat.suspendedDescription: Messaging is paused until Support Agent resumes the chat.
chat.lockedHint: This chat is locked by Support Agent.
chat.typingSharedHint: Typing is shared with Support Agent.
chat.acceptedOnlyHint: Messages can only be sent after the chat is accepted.

adminChat.title: Operator Conversations
adminChat.description: Review and reply to live chat messages from operators.
adminChat.selectConversation: Select an operator conversation to start replying.
